• Web-based MIDI sampler using Tone.js and midi-player-js libraries
  • Loads audio files as sampler and MIDI files as playback triggers
  • Features play, pause, restart controls with status updates
    const sampler = new Tone.Sampler({ urls: { C4: url } }).toDestination();
    player = new MidiPlayer.Player((event) => { if (event.name === 'Note on') sampler.triggerAttackRelease(event.noteName, "4n"); });

A MIDI sampler application that maps MIDI note events to audio samples. Users can upload custom audio and MIDI files or load default samples, with real-time playback control through play, pause, and restart buttons. The interface provides visual feedback on loading status and readiness for playback.
